title: [Apache Flink 1.3.1 Released](</2017/06/23/apache-flink-1.3.1-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.3.1 Released
June 23, 2017 -
The Apache Flink community released the first bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.3 series.
This release includes 50 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.3.0. The list below includes a det…
